libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set system properties for both JVM tests and native-test runtime: jgroups.bind_addr=127.0.0.1, java.net.preferIPv4Stack=true, and jgroups.use.jdk_logger=true. Prefer in-process stacks such as SHARED_LOOPBACK with SHARED_LOOPBACK_PING for channel/message/view coverage. Avoid default UDP multicast discovery and external JDBC services; JDBC_PING can be covered with a fake java.sql.Driver or no-op driver class.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8866 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.jgroups:jgroups:5.2.2.Final; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Default JGroups UDP/multicast stacks can be flaky or unavailable in CI/native-image environments.
Optional logging and OpenSSL code paths are classpath-sensitive; do not add SLF4J, Log4j2, or WildFly OpenSSL unless the generated tests intentionally exercise those optional integrations.
JDBC_PING and cloud/discovery protocols can imply external infrastructure if tested naively; use local stubs instead.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: JGroups has no required runtime dependencies or external services, but generated tests should force local loopback networking and stable JDK logging to avoid multicast/interface/logging variability in JVM and native runs.
